claim.observation: The root directory listing at offset 1411072 includes Windows/user directories and deleted root entries runme.cmd and version.txt.
claim.interpretation: The main partition exposes a Windows filesystem surface suitable for deeper artifact digs. The deleted runme/version entries are investigative leads only; this listing alone does not prove execution, persistence, or operator attribution.
